message:
feat(parser): add template literal scanning with interpolation nesting

Add scan_template_literal() to Utf8BoundarySafeScanner and an inline
template-literal scanning block to count_lexical_tokens_scalar_reference.
Both implementations handle escape sequences, ${...} interpolation
nesting with brace depth tracking, and UTF-8 boundary safety. Three
inline test cases cover template literal edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
